name: INNOVATIVE DESIGNS INC
summary: Innovative Designs, Inc. is a Delaware-incorporated company operating two business segments: house wrap for the building construction industry and cold weather clothing. Both segments use Insultex, a low-density polyethylene closed-cell foam with thermal, buoyancy, and scent-blocking properties. The company holds a license agreement with the Ketut Group for Insultex, sells products online and through distributors, and has worldwide distribution rights except Korea and Japan.
